plugins.name: ownersroom-all
plugins.description: Full OwnersRoom surface: cap table, options, portfolio, fund management, and news. 56 MCP tools + 23 Resources + all skills. Pick this if you want everything.

plugins.name: ownersroom-portfolio
plugins.description: Investor-focused: track your portfolio, holdings, vesting, and read news from companies you've invested in. ~13 MCP tools.

plugins.name: ownersroom-captable
plugins.description: Cap-table admin: manage shares, options, employee equity, and post company news. ~38 MCP tools.

plugins.name: ownersroom-commitments
plugins.description: Fund management for PE/VC GPs: LP commitments, capital calls, distributions, hurdles, and LP letters. ~22 MCP tools.
